common.tagline: Your booking page, in your pocket.

landing.title: Bookings made simple
landing.description: Send one link to your customers. They book in seconds — no signup, SMS verified, done.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing extra
features.subtitle: Just enough to run bookings — clean, fast, customer-friendly.

sms.title: SMS automation
sms.description: Confirmation after booking, 24h reminder before. You don't lift a finger.

qr.title: QR & share card
qr.description: Window-friendly QR + Instagram-story 1080×1920 card — one-click download.

reports.subtitle: Daily visits, conversion rate, popular hours — measure your performance.

i18n.title: Turkish & English

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Name, phone, email. SMS-verified in 30 seconds.

step2.title: Set your hours
step2.description: Pick the days and times you're available, set your slot length.

step3.title: Share your link
step3.description: Instagram, WhatsApp, business card — one tap to book.

sectors.title: Whatever your business
sectors.subtitle: Any appointment-based business can use rndv.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when business grows.
pricing.subtitle: No card, no trial timer. Test everything on Free, level up when you're ready.

pro.name: Pro
pro.taglinePromo: Special pricing for our first 100 members — then {fullPrice}/mo.

benefits.title: Close the notebook, open your day
benefits.subtitle: Stop negotiating slots over WhatsApp. You focus on the work, the system handles the rest.

time.title: Save 1–2 hours/day
time.description: No more "what times are you free?" back-and-forth. Share the link, the customer picks an open slot.

noshow.title: Halve no-shows
noshow.description: Automatic 24-hour reminder SMS. A single saved no-show pays for the whole subscription.

selfserve.title: Let customers self-serve
selfserve.description: You set the hours, customers only see open slots. No double-booking, no phone tag.

insight.title: Know your peak days
insight.description: See your busiest hours, top services and loyal customers from the dashboard.

benefits.note: First customer reviews coming soon — we're in launch mode, you're part of the journey.

q1.a: About 2 minutes. Sign up, verify SMS, set your hours, share your link. Customers can book immediately.

q2.a: Free plan has no reminder SMS — share WhatsApp links instead. Pro includes 50 SMS/month (reminders + confirmations). Need more? Extra bundles start at ₺49 — credits stay until used.

q3.q: Do customers need to sign up?
q3.a: No. They tap your link, pick a slot, enter name + phone, verify the 6-digit SMS. No account needed.

q4.a: Both the customer (via SMS cancel link) and you (from the panel). The other side is automatically notified.

q5.a: All data sits on Supabase (KVKK-compliant, EU servers). Only you can access it — row-level security blocks others entirely.

q6.q: Can I change my hours later?
q6.a: Yes, anytime in settings. New bookings respect the new hours immediately; existing ones are unaffected.

finalCta.title: Your booking page in 2 minutes
finalCta.subtitle: Start free, no card required. Upgrade when you're ready.
